summary: Deterministic proof that the repo's on-demand check surface owns the heavier self-dogfood workflow script tests.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the AGENTS.md claim that npm run test:on-demand owns heavier self-dogfood workflow script tests is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: The on-demand suite covers every possible self-dogfood workflow.
The on-demand suite should run in the standing verify gate.
Every historical self-dogfood artifact is current.

decision.reason: package.json maps npm run test:on-demand to the on-demand Node test suite under scripts/on-demand/*.test.mjs, the repo instructions name that command as the heavier self-dogfood workflow test gate, and the command exited 0 on 2026-05-16.
